title: isoetes caroliniana
intro: Isoetes caroliniana, also known as the Carolina quillwort, is a species of quillwort, a type of aquatic vascular plant that belongs to the family Isoetaceae. Traditionally, Isoetes caroliniana has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Isoetes caroliniana include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Isoetes caroliniana can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or salve for use in herbal remedies.
